---
title: "Mikrolärande"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Kompakta 1-2 timmars färdighetssessioner"
description: "Fokuserade 1-2 timmars mikrolärande-sessioner för specifika verktyg och teknologier. Perfekt för upptagna yrkesverksamma som snabbt vill lära sig en ny färdighet."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:55vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy</div>
    <h1>Mikro<span style="color:#F5A623;">lärande</span></h1>
    <p>Bemästra ett nytt verktyg på 1-2 timmar. Fokuserade sessioner för upptagna yrkesverksamma som värdesätter sin tid.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LANGUAGE NOTICE -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:750px;">
    <div style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.15); border-radius:16px; padding:2.5rem; text-align:center;">
      <i class="bi bi-translate" style="font-size:2rem; color:#F5A623; display:block; margin-bottom:1rem;"></i>
      <h2 style="font-size:1.5rem; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Sessioner på engelska & rumänska</h2>
      <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); max-width:500px; margin:0 auto 1.5rem;">Våra mikrolärande-sessioner genomförs för närvarande på engelska och rumänska. Utforska det fullständiga programmet nedan.</p>
      <a href="/academy/microlearning.html" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Se alla sessioner (EN)</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TOOLS & SYSTEMS -->
<div class="m-s" id="sessions" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Verktyg & System</h2>
    <p class="sub">Klicka för fullständig information på engelska.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/cli-intro/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Unix CLI"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 timmar</div><h3>Unix-kommandorad</h3><p>Grundläggande kommandon, navigering och shell-skript.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/tmux/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Tmux"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">1 timme</div><h3>Tmux</h3><p>Sessionshantering, paneler, fönster och produktivitetsgenvägar.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/emacs/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Emacs"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 timmar</div><h3>Emacs Essentials</h3><p>Navigering, redigering, buffertar och komma igång med paket.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/sc-im/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="SC-IM"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">1 timme</div><h3>SC-IM Kalkylblad</h3><p>Terminalbaserade kalkylblad med formler och dataimport.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/syncthing/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Syncthing"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 timmar</div><h3>Syncthing</h3><p>Privat, peer-to-peer filsynkronisering och konfiguration.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/libreoffice-calc/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="LibreOffice Calc"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 timmar</div><h3>LibreOffice Calc</h3><p>Avancerade formler, dataanalys, diagram och makron.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PUBLISHING & WRITING -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Publicering & Skrivande</h2>
    <p class="sub">Moderna dokumentverktyg för tekniska yrkesverksamma.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/quarto/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Quarto"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 timmar</div><h3>Quarto Publishing</h3><p>YAML, Markdown, kodblock och flerformatsutdata.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/org-mode/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Org-mode"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 timmar</div><h3>Org-mode Grunderna</h3><p>Anteckningar, uppgiftshantering, agenda och literat programmering.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/latex/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="LaTeX"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 timmar</div><h3>LaTeX för akademiskt skrivande</h3><p>Dokumentstruktur, ekvationer, bibliografier och paket.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row g-4 mt-1 justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/typst/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Typst"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">1 timme</div><h3>Typst Markup Language</h3><p>Modern typsättning med enkel syntax, matematik och mallar.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- OPERATING SYSTEMS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Operativsystem</h2>
    <p class="sub">Praktiska introduktioner till säkerhetsfokuserade plattformar.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/nixos/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="NixOS"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 timmar</div><h3>NixOS</h3><p>Deklarativ konfiguration, paket och återställningar.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/freebsd/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="FreeBSD"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 timmar</div><h3>FreeBSD</h3><p>Arkitektur, pkg och ports-samling.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/openbsd/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="OpenBSD"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 timmar</div><h3>OpenBSD</h3><p>Säkerhet, pledge, PF-brandvägg och skyddsåtgärder.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/qubesos/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="QubesOS"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 timmar</div><h3>QubesOS</h3><p>Kompartment, domäner och säkra arbetsflöden.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Vill du arrangera i din organisation?</h2>
    <p>Perfekt för lunch-och-lär-sessioner, teambuilding eller personlig kompetensutveckling.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/sv/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-handshake me-2"></i>Bli partner</a>
      <a href="/sv/academy/partnerships.html" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Läs mer om partnerskap</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
